---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, behaviour, or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve, or what workflow does it improve?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like n8m to do. Include example CLI invocations if relevant.

```bash
# e.g.
n8m watch ./workflows/my-flow.json
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about?

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or prior art that might help.
